rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax in component type or implementation annexes.
Implementation-level bindings like assignments are valid only in component implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting annex blocks.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Avoid inserting unsafe Boolean comparisons in annex blocks unless port types are explicitly AGREE bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not insert implementation-level assignments into component type annexes.
Do not include unsafe Boolean domain comparisons in annex blocks without explicit AGREE bool scope.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
